# AIX Sovereign Stack — Knowledge Base

> URL: https://axiomid-knowledge-base.vercel.app
> Type: wikigraph / digital garden (Quartz SSG v4.5.2)
> Codename: Echo369 | Spec: AIX/1.0 | v0.369.0

## Structure

Documents use [[wikilinks]] to connect concepts. Each doc has YAML frontmatter:
- `title`, `status` (stable | in-progress), `layer` (L0-L6), `tags`, `related`

## Key Documents

- Architecture: /architecture
- Stack Overview: /stack-overview
- Roadmap: /roadmap
- Changelog: /changelog
- Decisions (10 ADRs): /decisions

## Layer Map

L0=axiomid | L1=aix-format | L2=iqra | L3=aix-agent-skills | L4=alphaaxiom | L5=piworker-os | L6=gemclaw

## Latest Changes (May 2026)

- KDB: Quartz site built (34→143 pages), deployed on Vercel
- axiomid.app: production deploy with Ghost.build Postgres, UserAgent model, Pi SDK
- Graph: 34 nodes, 155 edges — see /graph.json
